input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.5.2.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.5.2.3
            TITLE: the current operating condition will be prominently displayed at the dynamic area, and may

            CONTENT:
            rule D.5.2.3: The current operating condition will be prominently displayed at the Dynamic Area, and may
D.5.2.3 The current operating condition will be prominently displayed at the Dynamic Area, and may 
be communicated by other means.

final_answer: The current operating condition will be prominently displayed at the Dynamic Area, and may be communicated by other means.
